skill_catalog.output:
# Superpowers

Before acting, check if a skill applies. Even 1% chance → load it.
Priority: user instructions > skills > system defaults.
Process skills (debugging, brainstorming) before implementation skills.

## Critical auto-triggers (ALWAYS apply — never skip)
- **BEFORE any git commit/push:** `use-skill unified-commit-gate` — runs all 5 gates in one load.
  Tests passing ≠ ready to commit. Your FIXES are new code and need their own gate pass.
  Individual deep-dive skills: `pre-commit-gate`, `enforce-style-guide`, `progressive-code-review-gate`, `professional-language-audit`, `public-repo-ip-audit`.
- **WHEN stuck (same error 3x, circular reasoning):** `use-skill think-twice`
- **WHEN writing shell scripts:** Load the shell language module first.

174 superpowers (auto-trigger) + 17 explicit skills installed.
Load: `node ~/.codex/superpowers-augment/superpowers-augment.js use-skill <name>`
Unsure which skill? `node ~/.codex/superpowers-augment/superpowers-augment.js match-skills "your query"`

⚠️ Workflow: feature-development (phase 6/7) | lint:❌ build:❌ test:❌ code_review:✅ output_verification:❌ | 👁️ADVISORY

run_battery.output:
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  run-battery.sh — automated quality suite
  MODE: Standard Review  |  threshold: 7.0
  Branch: fix/gate-scoping-cleanup
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  ⚠  AI JUDGMENT PREREQUISITE
  The code-review-battery AI judgment component MUST be
  completed before calling this script. This script only
  covers automated verification.

  ⚠  PHR PREREQUISITE (design doc changes, excludes skills/*.md)
  If the diff touches design docs (docs/*.md, AGENTS.md, etc.), run
  /sp-phr BEFORE this script. harsh-review.sh (Step 1) is a linter,
  NOT progressive-harsh-review. PHR is a separate AI gate.

  ⚠  LLM-SKILL-REVIEW PREREQUISITE (skills/*.md changes)
  If the diff touches skills/*.md, run llm-skill-review instead of
  PHR -- it supersedes (not supplements) both PHR and this battery
  for that file class. See tools/run-llm-skill-review.sh.

  ✅ identical vectors → similarity ≈ 1 (got 1.0000)
